signals.headline: Ethereum Price Surge Confirmed: Up $98
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Surge Confirmed: Up $98.74 (4.4%) Today to $2,403.78 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

Ethereum's price rose sharply as of 9:15 a.m. ET on April 22, 2026, marking a $98.74 daily gain from yesterday's levels (after a $25.16 drop noted on April 20 to $2,317.80), amid ongoing volatility from its August 2025 peak near $5,000[1][2]. No specific regulatory, network, or economic announcements
